privileged_info_summary: Verified via external search that the requested satellite NORAD IDs correctly correspond to the real-world NOAA 15, 18, 19, METOP-B, and METOP-C satellites. The target coordinates for Galapagos Base (-0.7402, -90.3138) and Ascension Island (-7.9467, -14.3559) explicitly match the task description and accurately correspond to their real-world geographical locations. All metadata claims exactly align with the required task parameters.
